Its sparkling, multi-faceted design mimics real gem brilliance. This eye-catching dress is available only at the Claire’s Store located in The Shoppes.

- First Edition

items.name: Golf Tee Hat - Olympic Edition
items.description: Tee off in style with the Golf Tee Hat - Olympic Edition! This playful hat is perfect for all golf lovers, featuring a mini golf tee right on top. Wear it on the course or anywhere you want to show your love for the game. Get ready to swing into action like an Olympic golfer!

items.name: Dreamy Pastel Blouse [PBR]
items.description:
🌸 Soft, airy, and effortlessly charming! ☁️
This blouse features delicate pastel watercolor patterns across a silky white fabric, paired with ruffled shoulders and voluminous sleeves. Its whimsical, dreamy vibe makes it the perfect choice for fashion showcases, roleplay, or simply bringing a touch of elegance and cuteness to your Roblox avatar.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Unique pastel watercolor pattern with soft, artistic tones
Puffy sleeves and ruffled details for extra flair
Perfect for casual fashion, roleplay, or fantasy builds
Enhanced with high-quality PBR textures for a realistic, silky finish
🔍 Keywords: blouse, pastel, dreamy, watercolor, fashion, stylish, elegant, cute, roleplay, outfit
✨ Float through Roblox in a blouse that feels like wearable art!
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: PET LIGER -  LOVE HEELS (Bubblegum)
items.description: The legendary LOVE HEELS, adored and shared across the world, arrive on Roblox for the first time ever in this stunning LIMITED EDITION Bubblegum colorway. These vibrant heels glow with soft, floating heart effects, giving your avatar a magical, romantic flair. Perfect for cute, elegant, or fantasy-inspired outfits, these heels make every step feel special.
